title: Times Invaders
short_description: A free online Space-Invaders-style math game: blast only the numbers that fit the rule before they land.
description: A real arcade shooter with the maths built into the trigger. Rows of number-invaders march down the screen and you slide your blaster along the bottom to defend. But there's a catch — you may only shoot the numbers that fit the changing rule: even, odd, multiples, factors, or primes. Zap a correct invader to score and build a combo; blast a wrong number and your cannon jams and you lose points. Let a correct invader slip past the line and you lose a heart. Each wave brings a new rule and a faster march. Pick a grade band (Grade 1–2 even/odd, Grade 3 multiples, Grade 4–5 factors & primes) and see how many waves you can survive. Times tables become target practice. Great for kids in grades 1–5 practising multiples, factors and prime numbers. Finishing posts a score to the leaderboard for GP.
controls: Move your blaster with the mouse / drag, or A and D / arrow keys. Fire with tap, click, or Space. Only shoot the numbers that match the rule at the top.
